loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing THD and harmonic data — per-phase harmonic values are not directly measured for this asset; using available THD columns as proxies. Flicker and Crest Factor data is not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing per-phase V-THD and I-THD trends; 5th/7th harmonics and max/min/average stats are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Power Factor and Phase Angle — K-Factor is not measured by this meter (no harmonic data available).
